test.command: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml or package.json

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align fullstack-worker verification procedure with mission execution policy by clarifying when lint is mandatory and whether push-to-main is expected during worker runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: auth-business-simplify and auth-student-simplify review reports both observed mismatch: fullstack-worker SKILL.md requires lint/push, while transcripts and handoffs consistently show type-check/build and commit only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit, current agent-browser invocation examples to skill guidance to avoid unsupported command forms during UI validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: auth-business-simplify transcript shows failed attempts (`Unknown command: start`, `Unknown command: --headless`) before successful browser verification.

rejectedObservations.observation: Separate lint/procedure mismatch observations from both auth reviews
